title: Path Under Everything
description:
Put/Create path blocks under anything!


Current bugs:

Any block that requires a full block below it can not be placed and will break if the block below is turned into a path block.
body:
# Path Under Everything
Put/Create path blocks under anything!

## Current bugs:

Any block that requires a full block below it can not be placed and will break if the block below is turned into a path block.
